race.comment: The well-related COOL DRINKS (9) (half to 2xG1 winner Shout The Bar) was a dominant maiden winner at the Sunny Coast when having the first run for the new stable and will have derived a stack of confidence from that breakthrough victory. Looks ready for the step-up in trip now and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. WATERMELON (1) goes well for hoop Youngberry who has two wins and a placing from five steers. Again gets the benefit of her claim and rates among the leading hopes. ARGENTUM ROCK (8) finally shed the maiden status over this track and trip last time out and will be rock-hard fit for this. Top-three credentials. HIDEOUT (10) draws favourably in gate two and must be respected out of the Waller camp. Has some upside and is in the mix. The well-named SINATRA (6) (by sire Microphone) best of the rest despite the sticky draw.
